intro.tagline: Available for full-time, contract, or freelance projects.
intro.valuePhrase: I help teams ship reliable software and keep their systems running.
intro.location: Based in Tauranga, New Zealand · Open to remote or on-site work
intro.sectors: Experience in healthcare, professional services, and B2B.
intro.description:
IT Systems Engineer and Software Engineer with a strong background in full-stack development, DevOps, and IT support.

I work with Python, JavaScript, and C++, focusing on building robust, scalable, and maintainable solutions for real-world production environments.

I adapt quickly to new challenges, whether solving complex problems, optimizing infrastructure, or developing clean and efficient applications. I value teamwork, professional responsibility, and continuous improvement.

Based in Tauranga, New Zealand. Open to remote or on-site work: full-time, contract, or freelance projects.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Some of the projects I have worked on

slider.title: Kaisen Gestión
slider.desc: Multi-tenant B2B web app for client and issuer management, tasks, e-invoicing (AFIP/ARCA), and accounts receivable. REST API with Express and PostgreSQL, React SPA with themes and role-based access.
slider.result: In use by accounting firms and client teams.

slider.title: Buran Tattoo
slider.desc: Production website built with Next.js and React, Supabase PostgreSQL and Storage, optimised for performance and hosted on Vercel.
slider.result: Live production site for a tattoo studio.

slider.title: Vos y Solo Vos
slider.desc: Full-stack web platform with React (Vite) and Node.js (Express), Supabase PostgreSQL and Cloudinary, responsive UI with TailwindCSS.

slider.title: IT-Services Informáticos
slider.desc: Corporate web platform using React and Tailwind CSS with client management functionality.
slider.result: Corporate site for an IT services company.

slider.title: Chubutex ERP
slider.desc: ERP platform with React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, JWT, and Docker for inventory and sales management.

slider.title: Estudio Kaisen
slider.desc: Production website using React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS with optimised performance.
slider.result: Production site for an accounting practice.

slider.title: Gaming Zone Blog
slider.summary: Multilingual technical blog (ES/EN/DE) with Django 5, Tailwind, CKEditor 5, light/dark mode, i18n, and SEO.
slider.desc: Multilingual technical blog (ES / EN / DE) built with Django 5, Tailwind CSS, and django-ckeditor-5. Includes light/dark mode, toasts and a confirmation modal on delete, i18n with gettext, SEO (dynamic meta tags, Open Graph, sitemap, robots.txt), data integrity (automatic timestamps on posts), and production-ready configuration (environment variables with python-dotenv, DEBUG and SECRET_KEY per environment). Demonstrates full-stack development, UX, and deployment best practices.

slider.title: FirstPrintWizard
slider.desc: Python (Tkinter) desktop tool to automate batch PDF printing with printer selection logic.
slider.result: Reduces manual work for batch printing.

slider.title: Estudio Kaisen - Prototype
slider.desc: Initial prototype for client presentation, with modern design and basic React functionalities.

slider.title: Dolce&Ricco
slider.desc: Artisanal bakery website with homemade recipes and product sales.

slider.title: Kaisen Med Platform
slider.summary: Flask clinical management platform: appointments, multi-clinic tenancy, records, billing, compliance docs, Docker/Redis. In development.
slider.desc:
Kaisen Med Platform — Clinical operations web platform built with Flask for clinics and care teams: appointment scheduling, clinician–patient coordination, reception and administration, focused on real-world operations and high concurrency.

Includes multi-clinic tenancy, advanced calendars, clinical records and attachments, billing with per-professional fees and payer/coverage tracking, webhooks for integrations, an operations metrics dashboard, 2FA, audit trails, and compliance-oriented documentation (EU/GDPR, NZ, US/HIPAA references). Production-minded infrastructure: Docker, Redis (rate limiting and RQ queues), load testing, and security hardening.

Stack: Python, Flask, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL/SQLite, Redis, Jinja2/Bootstrap, optional email/SMS.

slider.title: AFIP Viewer
slider.desc: Tool for viewing and analyzing ARCA (AFIP) reports in Argentina.

slider.title: Medinte Sur
slider.summary: Corporate SPA for a Patagonia healthcare network: value proposition, clinic profiles, contact and legal pages. React 18, TypeScript, Vite, React Router 7, Tailwind, static deploy.
slider.desc: Corporate SPA for a healthcare network in Patagonia. Includes a home page with value proposition, profiles for Clínica Santa María and Instituto Médico del Sur, a contact form and legal pages, with dynamic meta tags and brand palette. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, React Router 7 and Tailwind, designed for static deployment (e.g. Apache).
slider.result: Corporate healthcare network site in Patagonia.

slider.title: TaiFlow
slider.summary: SaaS booking engine for tour operators: guided checkout, multi-tenant branding, Stripe, Resend, GST NZ PDF invoices, REST APIs on Next.js 16. In development.
slider.desc: Direct booking engine for tour operators. TaiFlow is a SaaS-style platform that lets tour operators sell bookings on their own site, with a guided checkout experience, multi-tenant branding, an admin panel, and Stripe payments (Checkout and webhooks), email confirmations via Resend, GST NZ PDF invoices, and REST APIs on Next.js 16. The product focus is reducing reliance on OTAs and delivering a premium booking experience with operator control over tours, availability, and business data.

slider.title: Damasalud S.A.S — Corporate landing
slider.desc: One-page corporate landing for a comprehensive health management company: service presentation, contact with an integrated form (Formspree), and responsive layout. Static stack (HTML, modular CSS, vanilla JavaScript) with a simple build for deployment.

slider.title: MANLI S.A.S. — Corporate website (cleaning services)
slider.desc: Static site with Astro and Tailwind CSS for a cleaning company in Puerto Madryn: introduction, services, FAQ, and contact with a Formspree-integrated form (submit without redirect). Includes SEO (meta tags, Open Graph, robots.txt, sitemap), production-ready favicons and web app manifest, and deployment on static hosting.

slider.title: LIMPIOMARIS S.A.S. — Institutional site & bookings (Next.js)
slider.desc: Static site for a comprehensive cleaning company (buildings and institutions) in Puerto Madryn. Corporate pages in Spanish, contact form, and booking flow with calendar, Formspree integration, local SEO (JSON-LD, sitemap, robots), brand palette, and static export ready for Apache or static hosting.

itsupport.subheader: What I Can Do For You

cards.title: Hardware Support
cards.desc: Diagnosis, repair, and upgrade of desktops, laptops, and servers. I ensure your equipment is running at peak performance.
cards.benefit: Less downtime and longer equipment life.

cards.title: Software Troubleshooting
cards.desc: From operating system issues to application bugs, I provide solutions to ensure your software runs smoothly and securely.
cards.benefit: Fewer support tickets and faster resolution.

cards.title: Network Management
cards.desc: Support for setting up and maintaining networks, including routers, firewalls, and VPNs, ensuring a secure and stable connection.
cards.benefit: Stable, secure connectivity for your team.

cards.title: Full Stack Developer
cards.desc: Experienced Full Stack Developer skilled in Python, JavaScript, and frameworks like Django, Flask, and React. I create complete web applications, from backend to frontend, ensuring efficient and scalable solutions.
cards.benefit: Faster time to market and fewer bugs in production.

cards.title: Software Developer
cards.desc: I create innovative and functional solutions, delivering high-quality software that enhances the user experience.
cards.benefit: Less manual work and more reliable tools for your team.

cards.title: Web Designer
cards.desc: Specialized in custom applications, I use Python, JavaScript, and C++ to develop efficient and scalable solutions, always focused on meeting the client's needs.
cards.benefit: Scalable solutions that grow with your business.

cards.title: IT Support Specialist
cards.desc: As an experienced IT Support Specialist, I offer troubleshooting, system maintenance, and network management. Whether you're dealing with hardware issues or software configuration, I provide fast, reliable solutions to keep your systems running smoothly.
cards.benefit: Less downtime and lower support costs.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Courses and certifications that back my experience
